faq_subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our HRM system
faq_question_1: How do I get started with IngoHR?
faq_answer_1: Simply sign up for a free trial, and you'll have access to all the features. Our team will help you with the onboarding process.
faq_question_2: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq_answer_2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
faq_answer_3: Absolutely! We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your data.
faq_question_4: Do you offer custom enterprise solutions?
faq_answer_4: Yes, we offer customized solutions for large enterprises. Contact our sales team for more information.
our_location_description: Find us at our headquarters in Dhaka
ready_to_transform: Ready to Transform Your HR Operations?
ready_to_transform_description: Join hundreds of organizations already using IngoHR to streamline their HR processes
why_choose_us_desc: We're committed to providing the best support experience
fast_response_desc: Get replies within 24 hours on average
expert_team_desc: Our specialists are here to help you succeed
secure_data_desc: Your information is protected with enterprise security
support_team_desc: Meet the team ready to help you
faq_question_5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_answer_5: We accept all major credit cards, bank transfers, and mobile payments. Enterprise plans can be billed annually.
faq_question_6: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq_answer_6: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your account will remain active until the end of your billing period.
